programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her bathtub under mysterious circumstances; it will take a suspect committing another violent crime for the truth to finally be revealed.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: After a newborn baby girl vanishes from the hospital without a trace, people are galvanized into a nationwide search to find her.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Detroit is shaken to the core after a well-respected community member is gunned down during a robbery.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: In Burlington, N.C., gunfire erupts at a park killing a 21-year-old man; police are shocked when their investigation leads them to a "good girl" whose love for a "bad boy" has pushed her into a violent world of vice.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.sub-title: For Whom the Jingle Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Whitley's slumber is troubled by a Christmas nightmare as she envisions herself the campus "Scrooge.".

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Theo fears Vanessa's reputation will be ruined when one of his locker room buddies asks her out on a date.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff takes Rudy and her friends to a vaudeville tribute show; Vanessa's ex-boyfriend proposes marriage.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Clair and Cliff meet with Rudy's teacher (Melba Moore) to discuss their daughter's refusal to play the violin.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Theo visits a friend (Christopher Collet) hospitalized for cancer; Elvin gets in hot water with his spot-on impersonation of Cliff.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Louise plots with the neighbors to get George's mind off his work.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: A young woman claims Louise is her mother.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Bentley tries to avoid what looks like a certain marriage proposal from his girlfriend.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Renewing their wedding vows almost brings an end to George and Louise's marriage.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Mother Jefferson resorts to desperate measures to get attention.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Business setbacks shatter George's self-confidence.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: A stranger tries to pick up Mother Jefferson.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George is anxious to be a guest lecturer at a college until he realizes where the school is.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George's old Navy buddy makes a pass at Louise.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Mother Jefferson and Uncle Bertram join forces to reunite the feuding factions of Tom and Helen's families.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Lionel tries to hide denting the van from George.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George becomes embroiled in a furious battle of the sexes after one of his store managers quits.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Mother Jefferson and Louise fight over George while at a funeral.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: A mysterious midnight call causes chaos in the Jefferson household.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Imunique convinces Delroy to be part of her bachelor auction; Jasmine joins Latrell's basketball team and becomes MVP.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Third Leg
programme.desc: Marc is Latrell's wingman on a date with twins who have an explosive secret; Delroy lets Imunique and Jasmine join his poker game.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.sub-title: The Best Man for the Job
programme.desc: Delroy decides to run for city council with Imunique as his advisor; Delroy underestimates his competition.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: J.J. resorts to crime in an effort to get his family out of the ghetto.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: Florida has only one choice of action when she discovers what J.J. is doing for money.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Vanessa auditions for drum major; Cliff is introduced to one of his father's musician buddies (Dub Taylor).

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Clair and Theo attempt to prevent Cliff from trying to repair a leaky pipe by himself.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Rudy's fairy tale comes to life in her dreams -- and her family has starring roles.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff takes on his friend in petanque, an outdoor bowling game.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max accidentally gives Khadijah a depressant instead of aspirin before her big date with NBA star Cedric Ceballos.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Overton gambles the money for a new bed; Regine can't handle Mr. Perfect's obsession with his dog.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max makes a surprise discovery when her former law professor visits.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Synclaire joins an improvisational theater troupe and masquerades as a man.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When an aspiring fashion designer vanishes, investigators wonder if her mental health played a role; detectives question if what they've been told is genuine, or if it's all rumors designed to throw them off a killer's trail.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Someone murders a small business owner and immigrant living the American Dream in Washington D.C. in his own pizza mart; it seems like a robbery gone wrong until a suspect emerges with a tale of lies and betrayal.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A church deacon is found dead after an apartment fire, and the evidence points to foul play.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A beautiful college student falls under the spell of a so-called bad boy; during their whirlwind romance, he encourages her to join him in engaging in criminal activities.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A teenage girl falls for a handsome older man, then a gruesome discovery reveals that this love story has a dark side; before long, police are on the trail of a teen who will go to any lengths to be with her man.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Whitley deals with a sales clerk's (Peggy Walton-Walker) racism in her own way, succeeding only in complicating the situation.

programme.desc: Wood Harris chronicles his journey from Chicago's West Side to Hollywood; how he stays grounded through family, art, and discipline; bringing roles to life from movies like Above the Rim, The Wire and Creed.

programme.desc: Denise volunteers as a school counselor during final exams to get out of writing a major research paper.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Kelly's news of pregnancy; Delroy goes through a mid-life crisis and starts dressing younger; the gang puts on an intervention.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Latrell watches the Twilight Zone and falls asleep; Delroy gets greedy; Adonis sends back his plate of food.

programme.title: Love That Girl
programme.desc: Imunique gets fired; Jasmine becomes overwhelmed.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.sub-title: Rich Is Better Than Poor ... Maybe
programme.desc: After J.J. wins the lottery, he is faced with two gun-toting members of a girls' gang.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: J.J. tries to lend a helping hand when Michael experiences his first great romance.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Clair's friend turns to her for help when she fears her marriage is in trouble.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Denise comes home for a visit, but would rather spend time with her friends than her family.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Theo and his pals attempt to impress their dates for the senior prom.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: While on a fishing trip, Theo accidentally catches a corpse, and the ensuing media attention affects the Huxtables' lives.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Regine meets "Mr. Right" when she caters the millionaire's charity event; Khadijah crashes the party.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Max must defend a man who thinks he's the son of God; Synclaire sublets an apartment to a DJ.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.sub-title: Up the Ladder Through the Roof
programme.desc: Khadijah dreams she is in a '60s music group called the Flavorettes with Overton as their producer.

programme.title: Living Single
programme.desc: Overton and pals regret picking up a hitchhiker on their way to a football game.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: Six years after a young mother is murdered and her baby is kidnapped from their Vallejo, California home, an anonymous tip leads police to the perpetrator, another young woman desperate for the life, love, and baby of a popular teenager.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction: I'd Kill To Be You
programme.desc: A lifelong friendship grew into mentorship and sisterhood; but a social media spat gets out of hand when admiration turns to jealousy; when the argument moves from online into a face-to-face battle, only one will walk away with her life.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A heartbroken young mother is elated to get a second chance at love, then she discovers that her dream man has a dark side; before long, she finds her life in pieces as she sets out to prove she's the ride-or-die woman her new man demands.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: A beautiful college student drops everything to run away with her new man, only to return home nine months later with a shocking story about a brutal murder, a drug kingpin and the destructive desire at the center of her secret life.
